title: Case/Care Management * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Case/Care Management * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support, resource referral, and additional after-hours support for foster parents. Eligibility: Any foster parent with an ODHS Child Welfare case or in the Oregon Foster Care System Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 211 Visit Website More Details INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES ECHO Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides intensive case management and life skills services with an additional focus on hands-on parent education, child development, and ODHS advocacy. Utilizes Make Parenting a Pleasure and Parents as Teachers Curriculums. 4900 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Parents age 22 and younger with an open case with ODHS child welfare, are in foster care themselves, or who may not have custody of their children Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 239-6996 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES ECHO
